---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. …
2. …

**Expected**
What you expected instead.

**Environment**
- izumi version: (Settings → About)
- OS: (Windows / Linux distro / macOS + version)
- Install type: (installer / AppImage / built from source)

**Sourcing (if a playback/streaming issue)**
- Addon(s) / extension(s) in use:
- Debrid service:
- Title + episode:

**Logs / screenshots**
Any error text or screenshots. Do NOT paste your debrid key or any addon URL that
embeds a secret.
